questionHtml: Outline how the combination of core and cladding reduces the overall dispersion in the optic fibres.
markschemeHtml:
because the critical angle is nearly 90°

then only rays that are «almost» parallel to the fibre pass down it

so pulse broadening is reduced

OWTTE

meta.title: Outline how the combination of core and cladding reduces the overall dispersion in the optic fibres.
